---
title: "Photojournalism"
---


During my time as a reporter and editor for The Daily Northwestern, I had the opportunity to do some sports photojournalism for various Northwestern sports, which was a fun challenge to take on. I also took pictures for stories I wrote for the paper. Check out some of my favorites below. 

::: {layout-ncol="2"}

![Paczki eating contest in Evanston, Illinois](paczkieating.jpg)

![Northwestern men's basketball game versus Iowa](mbb_iowa1.jpg)

![Northwestern swim meet](nuswim1.jpg)

![Northwestern men's tennis match](numenstennis1.jpg)

![Northwestern tap dance performance](toniktap.jpg)

![Northwestern women's basketball game](womensbb1.jpg)

![Northwestern men's basketball game versus Iowa](boo.jpg)

![Northwestern swim meet](nuswimmeet.jpg)

![Northwestern men's tennis match](numenstennis2.jpg)


![Art showcase in Evanston, Illinois](communityart.jpg)


:::
